description: platformAutomerge is false on purpose: with no branch protection, GitHub-native auto-merge would merge before the CLI Compatibility Test finishes. Renovate-managed auto-merge instead waits for all branch checks to pass first.

customManagers.description: Track the pinned @bitwarden/cli versions in the Dockerfile ARGs

packageRules.description: Group both pinned Bitwarden CLI ARGs into one PR. Auto-merge waits for the CLI Compatibility Test (Renovate-managed auto-merge holds until branch checks pass).
The CLI compatibility test's Vaultwarden image — bumps run the full E2E test before auto-merge.
Pin GitHub Actions to commit SHAs and keep them current
Don't manage the user-facing docker-compose template image
